arts.ttl: Is Alexander Isak fit to start for Everton vs Newcastle? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: That point was picked up without Isak in the squad, with the influential striker missing the game with a toe injury. Isak is a name mentioned a lot among Fantasy Premier League (FPL) players, who have until the 11am deadline on Saturday to decide whether to keep the striker in their team, transfer him out, or leave him on the substitutes bench.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's trust in medical team as Eddie Howe reveals Callum Wilson fitness plan
arts.sum: Eddie Howe insists that Callum Wilson can come back fitter and stronger than before after his six-month injury lay off. When asked about Wilson's strength, Howe said: "Yes, I do (feel he is strong enough).

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon handed fresh boost as Newcastle United star left out of £120m dilemma
arts.sum: "With the period of the season we are in, I can justify why we wouldn’t start them [Foden, Palmer and Bellingham] all at the same time in terms of the amount of games they’re playing, what they are going back to and what they have come from,’" said Carsley this week. Anthony Gordon may have been shuffled across the front three for Newcastle United this season but the left winger looks poised to nail down that particular, favoured, role for England after Lee Carsley's latest comments.

arts.ttl: Two updates from PIF HQ, Newcastle United owners making major moves
Newcastle United's transfer priority clear as club urged to follow Antoine Semenyo path
arts.sum: Newcastle United's need to bring in a new right-winger should be a 'priority' this January with the club's current options labelled as 'a bit five years ago.' You can play Anthony Gordon there, you can play Harvey Barnes there, and shuffle them around but Eddie Howe has said the other day to us that he knows Barnes and Gordon both want to play on the left wing, and that's the best position for both of them.

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes: Newcastle star 'not interested' in Man City transfer due to 'two factors'
arts.sum: Manchester City reportedly suffer a transfer blow in their pursuit of Newcastle United and Brazil midfielder Bruno Guimaraes.

arts.ttl: Team News: Everton vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Everton and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho to Everton: Ex-Chelsea boss 'a strong option' to replace Sean Dyche
arts.sum: Fenerbahce boss Jose Mourinho emerges as 'a strong option' to replace Sean Dyche as Everton manager, according to a report.

arts.ttl: FIFA's new transfer rules will 'change football landscape' for Newcastle after unprecedented decision
arts.sum: According to the court's judgement, FIFA's refusal to issue an International Transfer Certificate for Diarra's move to Charleroi shows its rules "impede the free movement of professional footballers wishing to develop their activity by going to work for a new club". Diarra pursued legal action, arguing that his freedom of movement was affected, with the French international taking a year-long break from football after Charleroi withdrew from a deal, reports the Mirror .

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to make 'emotional' Everton selection as popular star left with 'work to do'
arts.sum: "Time will tell and his performances will dictate that," Howe said of Osula's Premier League readiness this week. "There was some really bright flashes from him, but like any young player, he knows he has areas of his game to work on.
